title: Trump not rushing Iran deal, whacks critics as 'losers'
summary_full: The president said the U.S. naval blockade of Iranian ports would remain in effect until "an agreement is reached, certified, and signed."
summary_public: The president said the U.S. naval blockade of Iranian ports would remain in effect until "an agreement is reached, certified, and signed."

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: Trump not rushing Iran deal, whacks critics as 'losers'
